highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers targeted performance gains and upstream Skia m151 bug fixes.
highlights_body: Hot paths in SKColor parsing, SKFourByteTag, HarfBuzzSharp.Tag, and SKShaper glyph reads have been optimized. The release also removes an unnecessary `unsafe` modifier from GRContextOptions and adds ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor.

bullets.detail: Two rounds of cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch improve rendering stability.

bullets.lead: ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads added to SKColor parsing
bullets.detail: SKColor hex parsing is now faster and allocation-free with new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: The unnecessary `unsafe` modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed, simplifying usage in safe-only projects.

bullets.lead: Performance improvements across hot interop paths
bullets.detail: Per-call char[4] allocations eliminated in HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse; SKShaper glyph results are now read via zero-copy spans.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Added a cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness
